path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 244, 195), rgb(38, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
